build_system: Gradle 8.14.5 with Kotlin 2.1.21. Three modules: :core (pure logic), :game (KorGE renderer), :composeApp (deprecated waitroom). :game JVM target is 21, others are 17.
test_framework: kotlin.test with commonTest source set for :core. No test runner for :game (compile-only + screenshot harness).
verification_instructions: 1. ./gradlew :core:desktopTest (all unit tests green), 2. ./gradlew :game:compileKotlinDesktop (compile check), 3. ./gradlew :composeApp:compileKotlinDesktop (no regression). Screenshot harness requires Mesa EGL (dnf install mesa-libEGL mesa-dri-drivers mesa-libgbm mesa-libGL, EGL_PLATFORM=surfaceless LIBGL_ALWAYS_SOFTWARE=1 ./gradlew :game:screenshot).
snapshot_or_generated_files: build/screenshots/*.png produced by :game:screenshot task. Not checked into git directly but referenced in docs/screenshots/.
setup_instructions: Java 21 required for :game. Gradle wrapper handles download. No additional setup needed for compile/test. For screenshots: dnf install -y mesa-libEGL mesa-dri-drivers mesa-libgbm mesa-libGL.
environment_constraints: No Android SDK (B006). No GL window (headless). Screenshots need Mesa EGL setup. KorGE consumed as library not plugin. Branch must be from origin/main BASE_SHA 13b8101a (brief says so but the brief commit a5df48dd is also on main, so branch from HEAD of main).
contribution_requirements: SCOPE must be strictly followed (SCOPE.modify + SCOPE.create only). DO_NOT_TOUCH files must not be changed. ScreenshotHarness.kt localCurrentDirVfs line must NOT be changed (B007). Existing shaders must NOT be modified, only consumed. Result brief required. One branch: kiro/korge-step8-frozen-approach.
key_patterns: WaterGrid pattern: grid class in :core with width/height/offsetX/offsetY, unit tests. WaterOverlay pattern: :game class taking Container+tileWidth/Height, creates SolidRects per grid cell. ShaderFilter pattern: UniformBlock with fixed location, FragmentShaderDefault DSL, updateUniforms push. Screenshot captures: korgeScreenshotTest(Size(640,360)), fill grids AROUND player position (camera centers on player), save() helper. addUpdater lambda receives kotlin.time.Duration, use dt.seconds.
directory_structure: :core/src/commonMain/kotlin/rpg/weather/ = simulation grids (DirtState, DrunkState, FootprintGrid, WaterGrid, WetnessState, WindState). :core/src/commonMain/kotlin/rpg/items/ = Inventory, Item, ItemCatalog. :game/src/desktopMain/kotlin/game/ = scenes + overlays + sprites. :game/.../shader/ = ShaderEffects + individual filter files. briefs/ = task briefs and results.
